title: fabric-archive SKILL.md — silent-skip path + write session_archive_attempted event
description: Two related changes: (1) Phase 0.5 viability gate FAIL — when entry_point ∈ {E1, E3, E5} (non-user-active), suppress the verbose gate-FAIL message and exit silently (only write the session_archive_attempted event). Existing behavior preserved for E2/E4 — user-active invocations still see the explicit message so they understand why nothing was archived. (2) NEW post-Phase 2 section: after every skill invocation (regardless of outcome), append a session_archive_attempted event to events.jsonl with the appropriate outcome enum value. This is the persistence half of the Q3.4 outcome state machine.

files.target: Phase 0.5 'On gate FAIL' subsection (L353-L397) + new post-Phase 2 section
files.change:
(1) Replace 'On gate FAIL' section content with branching logic:
  ```
  IF entry_point ∈ {E1_hook, E3_ai_self_trigger, E5_cron}:
    → SILENT-SKIP: do NOT emit gate-FAIL message; do NOT trigger AskUserQuestion
    → Still write session_archive_attempted event with outcome='skipped_no_signal'
    → exit skill silently
  ELSE (E2_explicit, E4_user_range):
    → existing gate-FAIL message (zh-CN/en variants preserved)
    → write session_archive_attempted event with outcome='skipped_no_signal'
    → exit skill
  ```
(2) Add new H3 'Phase 2.5 — Persist Archive Attempt' AFTER Phase 2 (Persist via MCP, L606-L696):
  - Mandatory step at end of every skill run
  - Append session_archive_attempted event to events.jsonl via Bash echo (line ≤ 4KB constraint already documented at L371-L393)
  - Outcome enum determination:
    a. Phase 2 wrote ≥1 pending entry → outcome='proposed', candidates_proposed=N, knowledge_proposed_ids=[idempotency_key_1, ...]
    b. Phase 0.5 viability gate FAILed → outcome='viability_failed' (if user was prompted but rejected) OR 'skipped_no_signal' (if E1/E3/E5 silent-skip path)
    c. Phase 1 batch review presented candidates BUT user dismissed all → outcome='user_dismissed'
    d. Phase 0.0 filter dropped all sessions → outcome='skipped_no_signal'
  - covered_through_ts = max(events_in_scope[*].ts) at time of skill run
  - For each session_id in scope, emit ONE session_archive_attempted event (multi-session archive = multi-event emission)
  - Append failure tolerant (fail-silent, log to stderr): event write is best-effort, must not block skill completion

implementation: Read Phase 0.5 gate-FAIL section (L353-L397) and Phase 2 (L606-L696) to confirm structure.
Rewrite 'On gate FAIL' subsection with the entry_point branching.
Add Phase 2.5 — Persist Archive Attempt as a new H3 section after Phase 2.
Document the outcome enum decision matrix (4-row table mapping skill terminal state to outcome value).
Document the multi-session emission rule (one event per session_id when archive spans multiple).
Add the 4KB single-line constraint reminder (referencing existing constraint at L371-L393).
Add a worked example: E5 cron runs, Phase 0.5 fails on no_signal → silent skip + write 1 attempted event with outcome='skipped_no_signal' for the today session.

reference.pattern: Existing event emission via Bash echo (L368-L370 in current Phase 0.5 abort) + Phase 2 fab_extract_knowledge call pattern (L612-L641)
reference.examples: Existing 'knowledge_archive_aborted' event emission (L369) — Phase 2.5 follows same Bash echo pattern but with new event_type.

rationale.chosen_approach: Pure SKILL.md prose change. Event emission via existing Bash echo pattern. Silent-skip path is a single branch in gate-FAIL logic. Phase 2.5 is the persistence half of the Q3.4 outcome state machine.
alternatives_considered: Server-side fab_extract_knowledge emits attempted event (rejected: fab_extract_knowledge is only called on success path; we need to record FAILURE too)
Skip silent-skip path, always emit gate-FAIL message (rejected: violates Q3.6 UX requirement that hook/cron contexts shouldn't interrupt with messages)
decision_factors: E1/E3/E5 are non-user-active → no human to receive a verbose message
Outcome tracking is mandatory for Q3.4 re-scan filter to work
Bash echo pattern is already established and 4KB-safe
rationale.tradeoffs: Event emission failure is silent (fail-tolerant); if events.jsonl write fails mid-skill, the outcome is lost. Mitigation: rc.22 events.jsonl 4KB atomic write guarantees + .fabric/.cache fallback is documented but NOT implemented in rc.25.

manual_checks: Dogfood: trigger E5 path → verify silent exit (no terminal noise) + events.jsonl has session_archive_attempted with outcome='skipped_no_signal'
Dogfood: trigger E2 → all candidates dismissed → events.jsonl has outcome='user_dismissed'
success_metrics: SKILL.md gate-FAIL section has entry_point branching
SKILL.md has new H3 'Phase 2.5 — Persist Archive Attempt'
integration: Manual dogfood validates 4 outcome paths writing events correctly

criteria: SKILL.md gate-FAIL section contains 'IF entry_point ∈' branching
SKILL.md contains exact string '### Phase 2.5 — Persist Archive Attempt'
SKILL.md contains outcome decision matrix with 4 rows (proposed / viability_failed / user_dismissed / skipped_no_signal)
Commit msg: 'feat(rc25): fabric-archive silent-skip + Phase 2.5 attempt persistence (TASK-07)'
